_publications._publicationTitle: Distinctive epigenomic alterations in NF1-deficient cutaneous and plexiform neurofibromas drive differential MKK/p38 signaling.

_contextSnippet: Western blot of a representative subset of CNF and PNF tumors demonstrated that MKK3 protein expression was highly correlated to MAP2K3 DMR methylation status (DMR1:MKK3 ρ = − 0.85, p = 0.00018)
details: Demonstrated strong inverse correlation (ρ = -0.85, p = 0.00018) between MAP2K3 DMR methylation status and MKK3 protein expression in Western blot analysis
